headline: UP Fiber Acquires AT&T’s Upper Peninsula Wireline Network, Expanding Local Ownership Across the Region
summary: UP Fiber to Invest in Infrastructure, Rural Broadband, and Local ConnectivityCARNEY, Mich., April 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- UP Fiber, Inc. today announced the successful closing of its acquisition of AT&T’s wireline assets throughout Michigan’s Upper Peninsula and Mackinaw City, marking one of the most significant regional expansions of locally-owned telecommunications infrastructure in decades. headline: Philip Kotler Revolutionized Marketing — And Didn't Stop There
summary: As a youngster, Philip Kotler loved books.  "When I was 12, I got into Plato and Aristotle," said Kotler, 94, who's considered the father of modern marketing.  "It could get noisy so I found a place I could read about the history of the world" in peace.

headline: Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Nasdaq Futures Rise As Trump Says Iran War May End 'Within Two Weeks'— Nike, RH, nCino, Beyond Meat In Focus (UPDATED)
summary:
(Editor’s note: The future prices of benchmark tracking ETFs, the lede, the economic data and the headline were updated in the story.)



U.S. retail and food services sales for February 2026 rose by 0.6% to $738.4 billion, slightly rebounding from a revised 0.1% dip in January. When excluding motor vehicles and parts, retail sales grew by 0.5% during the month.

headline: AT&T (T) Valuation Check After OneConnect Bundled Plan Launch
summary: AT&T (T) just rolled out OneConnect, a bundled plan that groups wireless, gigabit home internet, and connected devices into one monthly bill. The offering targets customers who want simpler, potentially cheaper connectivity. See our latest analysis for AT&T. The OneConnect launch lands at a time when AT&T’s 90-day share price return of 16.71% and year to date share price return of 18.04% suggest stronger recent momentum. However, the 5-year total shareholder return of 67.22% points to a very...

headline: The $197 Billion Question: How The Mega IPO Wave Reshapes Capital Markets And Crypto
